channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Local Police Have Access to ICE Facial Recognition App
item.description: A Department of Homeland Security document outlines plans to provide local police with facial recognition technology used by federal immigration agencies.

item.title: The 1874 Freedman's Bank Collapse and Today's Economic Disparities
item.description: In Savings and Trust, historian Justene Hill Edwards examines the Freedman's Bank, created for formerly enslaved people after the Civil War.

item.title: Toy Story 5 explores the battle between toys and technology. Here are 4 tips for managing screen time this summer.
item.description: Children's screen time increases significantly during summer. As Toy Story 5 shows, this can be problematic. Here are some tips for parents.

item.title: Juneteenth: How news of the Emancipation Proclamation spread across the South.
item.description: Many enslaved people learned about Lincoln's order through informal networks and rumors while the Civil War was still ongoing.
